untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a machine learning forecasting model (Random Forest or SVM) trained on lagged return data to generate predicted probability scores. This is a model-based prediction system that cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. The 'returns' indicator represents realized returns, not model-predicted probabilities. A custom model implementation outside the standard indicator framework is required.
translation_notes: Signal describes a sophisticated ML-based trading system using ensemble methods with lagged predictors. The entry condition (probability > 52%) and exit condition (probability < 50%) reference model outputs rather than observable market data. Stop loss (-1%) and profit target (+1.5% or 5-day exit) are translatable, but the core prediction mechanism is not. This rule requires custom model integration into the backtest engine.
